content.text: Frontend only. No backend, database, API, or model changes are needed. This is a pure template (HTML) reordering task within the Angular SPA.
The Purchasing module is the reference standard. Target order:
New Item → Admin → Clear Filter → Save View → Delete View* → Export
Delete View is conditional — only shown when a non-default view is selected
div to match the Purchasing order:
Move "Admin" button (currently 2nd) to 2nd position — no move needed
Move "Clear Filter" button (currently 3rd) to 3rd position — no move needed
"Delete View" (currently 6th) stays at 5th — no move needed
Net effect: Move "New Item" to front, move "Export" to end.

Vendor Admin has no "Admin" button (which is correct since it IS the admin page). With that excluded, the current order (Add Vendor → Clear Filter → Save View → Delete View → Export) already matches the Purchasing reference. No change needed.
The tracker has a second Refresh mechanism elsewhere (department selector triggers data reload), so removing the toolbar button is safe
All other WO Tracker buttons remain unchanged per AC4
None. This is a front-end-only layout change. All existing click handlers, permissions checks, and data bindings remain intact.

Low risk. Changes are limited to HTML element ordering within existing templates. No logic, styling, or functionality changes. All event bindings (click handlers, ngIf conditions) travel with their respective button elements.
Two frontend template changes were made:
— toolbar buttons reordered to match Purchasing module reference order: New Item, Admin, Clear Filter, Save View, Delete View, Export.
— the toolbar Refresh button was removed (the department selector still triggers data reload).
Vendor Admin, Purchasing, Project Tracker, and Incident.
Navigate to the Purchasing Tracker module
Verify toolbar button order is: New Item, Admin (if admin user), Clear Filter, Save View, Delete View (when non-default view selected), Export
Click each button to confirm functionality works as expected
Navigate to the Quoting Tracker module
Verify toolbar button order now matches Purchasing: New Item, Admin, Clear Filter, Save View, Delete View (when non-default view selected), Export
Click "New Item" — should open new quoting item form
Click "Admin" — should navigate to admin page
Click "Clear Filter" — should clear all grid filters
Click "Save View" — should save current view
Select a non-default view, verify "Delete View" appears, click it — should delete the view
Navigate to the Vendor Admin module
Verify toolbar button order is: Add Vendor, Clear Filter, Save View, Delete View (when non-default view selected), Export
Click each button to confirm functionality works as expected
Navigate to the WO Tracker module
Verify the "Refresh" button is NO LONGER present in the toolbar
Verify remaining buttons are: Clear Filter, Save View, Delete View (when non-default view selected), Export to Excel
Change the Department selector — verify data still refreshes correctly (this is the remaining refresh mechanism)
Click each remaining button to confirm functionality works as expected
Navigate to the Project Tracker module
Verify toolbar buttons are unchanged from current behavior
Verify toolbar buttons are unchanged from current behavior
